title: VCS Actor Resolver
description: To resolve the current actor's identity from the active version control system without duplicating VCS detection or CLI execution logic. `VcsActorResolver` implements the `ActorResolver` port by wrapping a `VcsAdapter` and delegating identity queries directly to it.
context: To resolve the current actor's identity from the active version control system without duplicating VCS detection or CLI execution logic. `VcsActorResolver` implements the `ActorResolver` port by wrapping a `VcsAdapter` and delegating identity queries directly to it.

rules: `VcsActorResolver` MUST accept a `VcsAdapter` instance as its constructor parameter.
When `identity()` is called, `VcsActorResolver` MUST invoke `identity()` on its wrapped `VcsAdapter` and return the resulting `ActorIdentity` (mapping the `VcsIdentity` fields).

scenarios.name: Successful delegation
given: a mock VcsAdapter whose identity() resolves to { name: "Developer", email: "dev@example.com", provider: "git" }
AND a VcsActorResolver constructed with that mock
when: identity() is called on the resolver
then: it calls identity() on the mock adapter
AND resolves to { name: "Developer", email: "dev@example.com", provider: "git" }
